title: IC 36-1-1-1 - Intent of title; citation to prior statute
text:
IC 36-1-1-1
Intent of title; citation to prior statute
Sec. 1. This title is intended to codify, revise, or rearrange applicable or corresponding
provisions in prior statutes. A citation to a prior statute may be construed as a citation to the
appropriate provision of this title if the prior statute is reenacted in the same or restated form
in this title.
[Local Government Recodification Citation: New.]
As added by Acts 1980, P.L.211, SEC.1.
